name: QA 317
description:
PCP QA Test No. 317

exercise pmlogsummary handling of corrupt log

(archive with dodgey metric descriptor, caused a core dump)



Copyright (c) 2007 Aconex.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404-container reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 317

exercise pmlogsummary handling of corrupt log

(archive with dodgey metric descriptor, caused a core dump)

Copyright (c) 2007 Aconex. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404-container reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 317.out.bad)
55c55,79
< pmrep: Corrupted record in a PCP archive
---
> Traceback (most recent call last):
>   File "/usr/bin/pmrep", line 1555, in <module>
>     P.execute()
>   File "/usr/bin/pmrep", line 567, in execute
>     refresh_metrics = self.pmconfig.fetch()
>                       ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
>   File "/usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/pcp/pmconfig.py", line 1146, in fetch
>     raise error
>   File "/usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/pcp/pmconfig.py", line 1139, in fetch
>     state = self.util.pmfg.fetch()
>             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
>   File "/usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/pcp/pmapi.py", line 3131, in fetch
>     raise pmErr(sts)
> pcp.pmapi.pmErr: PM_ERR_LOGREC Corrupted record in a PCP archive
> 
> During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:
> 
> Traceback (most recent call last):
>   File "/usr/bin/pmrep", line 1558, in <module>
>     sys.stderr.write("%s: %s" % (error.progname(), error.message()))
>                                  ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
>   File "/usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/pcp/pmapi.py", line 157, in progname
>     return c_api.pmGetProgname()
>            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> AttributeError: module 'cpmapi' has no attribute 'pmGetProgname'
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
